narratives.Overview: marky (marklint) — an extensible, plugin-based Markdown linter built on the unified/remark ecosystem. Analyzes Markdown via mdast (Markdown Abstract Syntax Tree), supports reuse of markdownlint and remark-lint rules, provides a first-class plugin system, and ships with a production-grade Mermaid diagram validation plugin.
narratives.TechStack: CLI using TypeScript — unified, remark-parse, remark-lint, micromark (core pipeline); @mermaid-js/parser (Mermaid validation); commander.js (CLI); vitest (testing)
narratives.Quality: Run task check before every commit. Achieve >= 85% coverage overall + per-module. Store secrets in secrets/ dir.
narratives.Branching: Allow direct commits to master: true
